name: Pure Storage, Inc.
description: Pure Storage, Inc. provides a data storage platform that enables organizations to maximize their data assets while reducing the complexity and expense of managing the underlying infrastructure. The company offers flash-based storage solutions and software-defined storage services designed for high performance, reliability, and scalability. Its portfolio includes FlashArray for block storage, FlashBlade for file and object storage, and the Evergreen subscription model, which allows customers to modernize their storage without downtime or migrations. Pure Storage serves a wide range of industries, helping them leverage data for artificial intelligence, cloud computing, and modern application development.
